title: Booking.com Hotel Scraper Input
description: Nhap tu khoa tim kiem, URL khach san, hoac ten vung/thanh pho de trich xuat du lieu Booking.com.

searchTerms.title: Tu khoa tim kiem
searchTerms.description: Ten khach san hoac diem den. Hieu qua nhat voi ten cu the (vd: 'The Chum Boutique Hue').

propertyUrls.title: URL khach san
propertyUrls.description: URL trang khach san Booking.com (vd: https://www.booking.com/hotel/vn/the-chum-boutique.html). Neu URL co san checkin/checkout/group_adults/no_rooms, actor tu lay GIA THUC TE cho khach san do.

hotelIds.title: Hotel IDs
hotelIds.description: ID khach san Booking.com dang so neu da biet (vd: 10214414). Dung khi ban da co san ID.

locations.title: Vung / thanh pho can tim
locations.description: Ten vung/thanh pho (vd: 'Hue') HOAC dan link trang tim kiem Booking.com (vd: https://www.booking.com/searchresults.html?ss=Hue). Actor tu tim tat ca khach san trong vung do, gioi han boi maxItemsPerLocation.

maxItemsPerLocation.title: So khach san toi da moi vung
maxItemsPerLocation.description: So khach san toi da lay cho MOI vung trong 'locations'. 0 = khong gioi han (co tran an toan noi bo). Mac dinh 50.

checkIn.title: Ngay check-in (mac dinh)
checkIn.description: Dinh dang YYYY-MM-DD. Dung de lay GIA THUC TE cho cac khach san KHONG co san checkin tu URL rieng. Bo trong = khong lay gia (nhanh hon).

lengthOfStay.title: So dem (mac dinh)
lengthOfStay.description: So dem o lai, dung cung voi checkIn o tren. Mac dinh 1.

adults.title: So nguoi lon (mac dinh)
adults.description: Dung cung voi checkIn o tren cho cac khach san khong co san thong tin nay tu URL.

rooms.title: So phong (mac dinh)
rooms.description: Dung cung voi checkIn o tren cho cac khach san khong co san thong tin nay tu URL.

currency.title: Tien te
currency.description: Ma tien te hien thi gia (vd: USD, VND, EUR). Mac dinh USD.

language.title: Ngon ngu ket qua
language.description: Ngon ngu du lieu tra ve (ten phong, tien nghi, mo ta, review...).

maxItems.title: Gioi han so ban ghi
maxItems.description: So ban ghi khach san toi da tren tat ca nguon. 0 = khong gioi han. Dung de kiem soat chi phi.

requestDelay.title: Do tre giua request (giay)
requestDelay.description: So giay cho giua cac lan goi khach san lien tiep. Tang len voi batch lon de giam nguy co bi chan.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: Cau hinh proxy. Nen dung Apify Residential proxy cho quy mo lon.
